meta.title: Synaplan — AI under control
meta.description: The open-source platform for professional AI management. All models, one platform. Secure, transparent, flexible.

hero.title: Take control of your AI.
hero.description: Synaplan connects leading AI systems with professional management — free model choice, cost control, full transparency, and GDPR compliance.

solutions.title: Built for every team
solutions.subtitle: Whether you're an enterprise, a developer, or a website owner — Synaplan adapts to your needs.

companies.title: For Companies
companies.description: Deploy AI safely and efficiently, with full data control, compliance, and detailed audit logs.

developers.title: For Developers
developers.description: Build on open standards, API-first and open source — flexible and without vendor lock-in.

widget.title: Chat Widget
widget.description: Integrate a KI chatbot into your website in minutes. GDPR-compliant, starting at €19.95/month.

features.title: Everything you need for professional AI management
features.subtitle: From model selection and cost control to logging and multilingual capabilities.

multiModel.label: Multi-Model
multiModel.title: Route to the best model
multiModel.description: Send prompts to OpenAI, Google, Meta, Grok and more. Switch freely, no vendor lock-in.

documents.label: RAG
documents.title: Your knowledge, AI-powered
documents.description: Upload documents and get context-aware answers. Your own AI knowledge base.

audit.label: Compliance
audit.title: Every action logged
audit.description: Gapless audit trails for all AI activities. Meet GDPR and internal compliance requirements.

widget.label: Widget
widget.title: Live on your website in minutes
widget.description: Embed a smart chatbot via WordPress plugin or code snippet. Multilingual, customizable.

dashboard.label: Analytics
dashboard.title: Full visibility
dashboard.description: Monitor AI and document usage with a real-time dashboard. Track costs, tokens, and performance.

security.label: Security
security.title: Your data, your rules
security.description: Self-host on your own infrastructure or use our cloud. Full data sovereignty, always.

useCases.title: Real results from real companies
useCases.subtitle: See how organizations use Synaplan to deploy AI securely and efficiently.

openSource.title: Built in the open
openSource.subtitle: Synaplan is 100% open source. Inspect the code, contribute, or self-host — you're always in control.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your AI?
cta.subtitle: Start for free or book a 30-minute demo to get a clear AI roadmap for your organization.
